creator: wxs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Actually, this port does not build on anything less than (what will be)
8.0. It requires spawn.h which does not exist on anything other than
8.0. I'm hesitant to commit this update because it will only work on a
version that isn't even released yet.

I think we should work around the fact that spawn.h doesn't exist in
other versions. Maybe the author has a workaround for systems that don't
have posix_spawn() and friends?

-- WXS
